blogs.title: Memories of North: A journey through northwestern Bangladesh
blogs.excerpt: My unforgettable trip through the northwestern regions of Bangladesh. From the vibrant city of Rajshahi to the serene landscapes of Naogaon, Rangpur and Bogura, this journey was filled with adventure, hospitality and most importantly - friends.

blogs.title: Building a live election monitoring system for Netra News
blogs.excerpt: In February 2026, I worked with Netra News to develop a live election monitoring system targeting the national election of Bangladesh. I worked as a systems, backend, and infra lead for the project. We successfully pulled it off. In the span of a few hours, our system reliably served roughly 8 million requests(client + server) with 100% uptime, with a small cost, for a project this large.
